title: 16x24cm Zip Lock Bags, Holographic Large Mylar Foil Ziplock Food Storage Bags Sealable Packaging Gift Pouch for Candy Cookies Jewellery Lash Lip Gloss Sample(Pack of 50)
features: Holographic Shiny Bags - 50pcs holographic zip lock bags are made of PET and Aluminum foil, food grade material and sparkly rainbow holographic design to decorate your snack, jewelry, makeup sample, and leave a memorable impression

Sealable and Reclosable - These 16X24cm resealable holo mylar bags seal tight with zip lock and are smell/odor proof, there is enough space to double seal with sealer if you need and has a tear open part after sealed

Moisture Proof and Smell Proof Bags - The sealable aluminum foil pouches will keep all the water and moisture out and any odors in when bag closed. Nice for keeping your herb, spice, coffee, candy fresh and your jewelry, earring, bracelets in good condition

See-through Sparkly Sample Bags - One side of the bag is transparent and the other is opaque, see-through side and holographic shine make your goods pop out. And there is a hole for easy hanging and display

Multi-function Holographic Packaging - The baggies are good for packing snacks, candy, party favors, and as a gift to send to others; also nice for jewelry, earrings, bracelets, eyelashes, lip gloss to sell or packing cosmetic samples to give away
description: One side of the bag is clear and the other is opaque, so you can see the product that's in them by the see-through side, and the opaque side makes the content stand out. The sealable aluminum foil pouches will keep all the water and moisture out and any odors in when bag closed. Nice for keeping your herb, spice, coffee, candy fresh and your jewelry, earring, bracelets in good condition. These large resealable holo mylar bags seal tight with zip lock and are smell/odor proof, there is enough space to double seal with sealer if you need and has a tear open part after sealed. Specification of Zip Lock Bags: Size: 16x24cm/6.3x9.4 inch Feature: Sealable, Food Grade, Reusable,See-Through,Multi-purpose Package Content: 50PCS Holographic Packaging Bags Tips: Manual measurement may have little error (±0.5cm error).
